title: No Taxpayer Funding for the World Health Organization Act
short_title: No Taxpayer Funding for the World Health Organization Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.
crs_summary: No Taxpayer Funding for the World Health Organization Act This bill prohibits the United States from providing any assessed or voluntary contributions to the World Health Organization.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.
